title: elettaria cardamomum var. minor
intro: Elettaria cardamomum var. minor, also known as the "lesser cardamom" or "green cardamom", is a plant species belonging to the ginger family (Zingiberaceae) and is native to the Western Ghats in India. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of this plant include relief from digestive issues, nausea, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of Elettaria cardamomum var. minor include tea, essential oil, and powder, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
